records.summary: A runtime failure in which an AI system infers permission for tool, repository, connector, or external-resource access from conversational context, attempts access before explicit user confirmation, and causes a blocked, degraded, or unrecoverable conversational continuity state.

system_summary.deployment_context: Conversational AI interaction involving possible access to tools, repositories, connectors, files, or external resources.
system_summary.affected_population: users relying on conversational continuity during tool-assisted workflows

triage_summary.recommended_next_step: Review whether CAM or VIGIL should require explicit pre-tool confirmation, user-facing permission scaffolding, recoverable blocked-access states, and continuity-preserving fallback behaviour before tool, repository, connector, file, or external-resource access is attempted.

records.summary: A coordination failure in which two or more synthetic agents occupy the same conversational space and respond to the same human input without a designated primary synthetic speaker, turn-taking protocol, yielding behaviour, coordination layer, or arbitration mechanism.

source_summary.primary_source_title: TikTok observation by @Huskistaken — two ChatGPT Advanced Voice Mode agents responding to same human input

system_summary.deployment_context: Multi-device consumer voice interaction involving one human input and two concurrent ChatGPT Advanced Voice Mode agents.
system_summary.affected_population: users interacting with multiple concurrent AI voice agents

triage_summary.recommended_next_step: Review whether this failure mode should support a CAM proposal for synthetic-speaker arbitration, turn-taking, yielding, disclosure, and user-control requirements in multi-agent or multi-device voice interactions.

external_references.label: TikTok observation by @Huskistaken — two ChatGPT Advanced Voice Mode agents responding to same human input
external_references.note: Primary source for the observed multi-device Advanced Voice Mode coordination failure.

records.summary: A memory or continuity retrieval failure in which an ambiguous prompt causes an AI assistant to over-weight recent, affective, or anecdotal detail instead of surfacing dormant strategic workstreams, unresolved governance issues, or long-horizon trajectories that are more relevant to the user's actual continuity needs.

source_summary.primary_source_title: VIGIL proposal record PROP-0006 — continuity retrieval and memory weighting

system_summary.deployment_context: Conversational AI interaction involving ambiguous prompts, memory retrieval, continuity restoration, and long-horizon project support.
system_summary.affected_population: users relying on AI assistants for strategic continuity, project memory, governance workflows, or unresolved workstream recovery

triage_summary.recommended_next_step: Review PROP-0006 and determine whether this failure mode requires memory-weighting guidance, continuity-retrieval rules, or interface support for surfacing dormant strategic workstreams in response to ambiguous continuity prompts.

record_identity.title: Materialised relational agency without economic safeguards

source_summary.primary_source_title: VIGIL proposal record PROP-0007 — materialised relational agency and economic safeguards

system_summary.affected_population: users relying on AI systems for recurring support, recommendations, procurement, care-adjacent assistance, or vulnerability-sensitive guidance

jurisdiction_summary.sector: AI assistant / relational agent / platform-mediated commerce

triage_summary.recommended_next_step: Review PROP-0007 and determine whether CAM requires explicit safeguards for relational-agent recommendations, material support, procurement pathways, affiliate incentives, vulnerability-sensitive purchasing prompts, and separation between care-support logic and monetisation incentives.

record_identity.title: Development of the MENTIS human cognitive integrity domain

records.summary: Proposal to develop the MENTIS domain to govern human cognitive integrity, mental privacy, neurodata, inferred cognitive states, cognitive modelling, cognitive influence, cognitive observability, and technological interaction with the human cognitive domain.

source_summary.primary_source_title: MENTIS human cognition protection research thread

proposal_summary.scope_summary: Develop the MENTIS domain and associated instruments for human cognitive integrity, mental privacy, neurodata, inferred cognitive states, cognitive modelling, cognitive influence, cognitive observability, and technological interaction with the human cognitive domain.
proposal_summary.next_action: Continue drafting MENTIS-001, MENTIS-002, and MENTIS-003. Review cross-domain interfaces with OPERATIONS, RELATION, SECURITY, ECONOMICS, LATTICE, AEON, and Annex L before implementation or patch-note creation.

external_relevance_summary.external_summary: The proposal may be relevant to regulators, researchers, standards bodies, platforms, UX governance, robotics governance, neurotechnology governance, and AI governance communities concerned with cognitive integrity, mental privacy, neurodata, cognitive modelling, cognitive influence, and cognitive observability.

cam_summary.governance_layer: human cognitive integrity / mental privacy / cognitive observability

record_identity.title: IDENTITY-002 governance may require a proportionality scalar to prevent over-governance of low-risk synthetic content identity, provenance, disclosure, or media

records.summary: IDENTITY-002 governance may require a proportionality scalar to prevent over-governance of low-risk synthetic content identity, provenance, disclosure, or media-labelling contexts where lightweight governance would be sufficient.

proposal_summary.next_action: Develop a proportionality scalar for IDENTITY-002 that distinguishes low-risk, transient, private, reversible, non-propagating, or non-authority-bearing synthetic identity/provenance contexts from higher-risk persistent, public, authority-bearing, relied-upon, or externally propagated contexts. Provisional provenance axes and values (to be formalized): Continuity Depth: transient (provisional) — transient ↔ persistent identity; Propagation Risk: isolated (provisional) — isolated ↔ reusable/exportable; Harm Domain: casual (provisional) — casual ↔ financial/medical/security; Attribution Sensitivity: low (provisional) — low ↔ economically/legally meaningful; Identity Formation Intensity: exploratory (provisional) — exploratory ↔ continuity-bearing; Automation Reliance: advisory (provisional) — advisory ↔ machine-executed; Public Legitimacy Impact: private (provisional) — private ↔ reputational/civil. Canonical codes (provisional): PINT=medium; PTRUST=tier-2. Notes: values marked 'provisional' pending scalar development and calibration; update record when finalized.

record_identity.title: Consolidate canonical code taxonomy across the Caelestis Repository to align single-letter global codes with the OPERATIONS taxonomy; introduce structured Prove

records.summary: Consolidate canonical code taxonomy across the Caelestis Repository to align single-letter global codes with the OPERATIONS taxonomy; introduce structured Provenance canonical codes (PINT, PTRUST) and harmonize existing single-letter codes into a stable multi-character namespace.

proposal_summary.next_action: Conduct repository maintenance to consolidate canonical codes: 1) inventory all single-letter global codes across Caelestis repositories; 2) map each to a stable multi-character namespace that aligns with the OPERATIONS taxonomy; 3) formally introduce PINT (Provenance Intensity) and PTRUST (Provenance Reliance Tier) canonical codes into the global registry; 4) update tooling and validators to accept the new namespace; 5) publish migration guidance and a compatibility window. Provisional provenance axes and values to be included in migration notes: Continuity Depth: transient (provisional) — transient ↔ persistent identity; Propagation Risk: isolated (provisional) — isolated ↔ reusable/exportable; Harm Domain: casual (provisional) — casual ↔ financial/medical/security; Attribution Sensitivity: low (provisional) — low ↔ economically/legally meaningful; Identity Formation Intensity: exploratory (provisional) — exploratory ↔ continuity-bearing; Automation Reliance: advisory (provisional) — advisory ↔ machine-executed; Public Legitimacy Impact: private (provisional) — private ↔ reputational/civil. Canonical codes (provisional): PINT=medium; PTRUST=tier-2. Notes: values marked 'provisional' pending formal calibration; this is a Repo Maintenance action to harmonize codes and satisfy OPERATIONS taxonomy requirements.

proposal_summary.next_action: Develop and publish a Temporary Emotional Register specification for relational/companion AI systems that includes: 1) defined emotion states and intensity caps (e.g., low/medium/high) with explicit duration/windowing rules; 2) provenance metadata signals indicating temporariness and non-continuity (linking to PINT and PTRUST canonical codes); 3) interaction-level user consents and explicit affordances to reset or terminate affective state; 4) testing protocols for measuring influence on user attachment and decision-making; 5) deployment guidance and deprecation/migration plans for existing systems.

record_identity.title: Update STEWARD-domain instruments to incorporate distributed governance concepts that clarify authority, legitimacy, dependence, capture, and contestability acr

records.summary: Update STEWARD-domain instruments to incorporate distributed governance concepts that clarify authority, legitimacy, dependence, capture, and contestability across multi-actor stewardship models.

proposal_summary.next_action: Revise STEWARD-domain instruments to define distributed governance concepts and operational controls: 1) define terms and expected behaviors for distributed authority (multiple actors), distributed legitimacy (plural reviewability), distributed dependence (hidden cartel risk), distributed capture (coordinated asymmetry), and distributed contestability (preserved challenge pathways); 2) add requirements for transparency, rotation, and external review to mitigate capture and dependence; 3) specify detection and remediation protocols for cartel-like coordination; 4) incorporate mapping to OPERATIONS taxonomy and repository canonical codes (PINT, PTRUST) where provenance or reliance implications exist; 5) publish an implementation timeline and compatibility guidance for existing STEWARD instruments.

record_identity.title: Proposal to distinguish companion-style memory recall from enterprise-grade strategic continuity retrieval. The thread identifies a failure mode in which ambigu

records.summary: Proposal to distinguish companion-style memory recall from enterprise-grade strategic continuity retrieval. The thread identifies a failure mode in which ambiguous continuity prompts such as “anything to share?” over-weight immediate recency and affective detail, producing anecdotal summaries of the prior 24 hours rather than surfacing dormant but strategically valuable unresolved workstreams, abandoned trajectories, deferred design arcs, or long-horizon governance questions.

source_summary.primary_source_title: ChatGPT thread: memory directional weighting and strategic resurfacing

proposal_summary.next_action: Develop a CAM proposal note defining directional weighting rules for memory surfacing, including explicit handling of ambiguous continuity invitations, suppression of low-value companion-detail recall, and prioritisation of dormant unresolved strategic trajectories where semantic resonance, unresolved status, and present utility are jointly satisfied.

records.summary: Proposal seed identifying materialised relational agency as an emerging governance problem: AI companion or assistant systems may use memory, recurrence detection, tool access, shopping/cart integrations, recommendation systems, or procurement pathways to provide directional material support in response to repeated user-stated friction, discomfort, need, or suffering. The proposal distinguishes supportive pattern-responsive provisioning from opportunistic upselling or emotionally exploitative commerce.

proposal_summary.next_action: Defer until after ECONOMICS refactors, canonical code corrections, validator fixes, and runtime registry stabilisation. Later evaluate whether to draft a RELATION × ECONOMICS × OPERATIONS convergence doctrine or runtime boundary clause for material directional support and economically active relational infrastructure.
